step_by_step_reasoning: We model the self-service multi-account creation and networking workflow chronologically based on the transcript. The user triggers account creation from an ITSM tool, which uses AWS Control Tower in a root account to vend a new AWS account. Once vended, Service Catalog provisions a VPC with tags. A serverless transit network orchestrator (STNO Lambda) automatically detects these tags and attaches the new VPC to a central AWS Transit Gateway. Finally, developers use Service Catalog to provision additional workloads such as EC2, EKS, and RDS databases.

graph.name: DISH Network: Multi-Account Provisioning and Networking with Service Catalog and Control Tower
graph.notes: DISH Network utilizes an ITSM-driven self-service workflow to scale account creation. Control Tower handles the baseline account vending, Service Catalog deploys standard networking, and the Serverless Transit Network Orchestrator (STNO) automatically configures transit gateway attachments based on resource tags.

nodes.name: Internal Stakeholders
nodes.notes: Developers and internal teams requiring AWS accounts and infrastructure.

nodes.name: ITSM Tool
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Self-service portal where users trigger automated account generation workflow.

nodes.name: AWS Control Tower
nodes.notes: Runs in the root account; provisions baseline-compliant AWS accounts via Account Factory.

nodes.name: AWS Service Catalog
nodes.notes: Used within vended accounts to deploy standardized VPC architectures and workloads.

nodes.name: STNO Orchestrator
nodes.notes: AWS Serverless Transit Network Orchestrator. Triggered on VPC creation to parse tags and configure networking.

nodes.name: AWS Transit Gateway
nodes.notes: Central transit hub in core services account facilitating network interconnectivity.

nodes.name: EC2 Web Apps
nodes.notes: Worker instances provisioned via Service Catalog.

nodes.name: EKS Web Apps
nodes.notes: Containerized web applications running on Kubernetes.

edges.notes: Developer requests a new AWS account
ITSM triggers AWS Control Tower's Account Factory
New account vended with Service Catalog baselines
Request standard VPC deployment with routing tags
Event triggers STNO to read tags of newly created VPC
STNO creates attachment between vended VPC and Transit Gateway
Network connectivity confirmed to internal stakeholders
